name: CockroachDB
description: CockroachDB single-node. SQL on 26257, Admin UI on 8080.

variables.name: COCKROACH_INSECURE
variables.description: Set to 'true' for dev mode no-auth (default). Set to 'false' and provide COCKROACH_CERTS_DIR for production.

variables.name: COCKROACH_DATABASE
variables.description: Default database to create on startup
